title: Tim Finnigan is New President of Ahtna Subsidiaries AEI & AES
summary: Tim is a long-time Ahtna employee, having been with the Ahtna family of companies since 2008. Tim is a second generation Alaskan construction professional with over 14 years in an executive role and over 44 years in the construction/environmental industry. title: Tim Gould is New VP of AEI/AES
summary: Tim brings to Ahtna a wealth of skills, industry knowledge, and extensive work experience, including multiple roles directing, managing, and overseeing facilities, energy, environmental and transportation projects for federal, state, and local governments.
